items.title: Some Simple Economics of AGI — Verification Bandwidth as Binding Constraint

content.abstract: Formal economic model treating AGI transition as collision between automation cost and verification cost. As AI decouples cognition from biology, growth bottleneck shifts to human verification bandwidth.

items.title: The Road to Useful Quantum Computers — Utility Gap Analysis

content.abstract: Comprehensive roadmap establishing gap between current quantum capabilities and practical utility. Maps hardware, algorithm, and error correction milestones needed for quantum advantage.

items.title: Quantum Attacks on Nuclear Power Plant Cybersecurity

content.abstract: First systematic analysis of quantum computing threats to nuclear power plant cybersecurity, with defense strategies including post-quantum cryptography migration for critical infrastructure.

items.title: Reasoning LLMs for Autonomous Agent Control — ICRA 2026

content.abstract: First systematic evaluation of reasoning-mode LLMs (o1, DeepSeek-R1) for autonomous robot task planning. ICRA 2026 accepted.

items.title: Quantum LDPC Codes for Error Correction Breakthroughs

content.abstract: Novel quantum LDPC code construction achieving near-optimal encoding rates with polynomial-time decoding, advancing quantum error correction toward practical fault tolerance.

items.title: Humanoid Robot Learning from Human Demonstration at Scale

content.abstract: Scalable framework enabling humanoid robots to learn complex manipulation and locomotion tasks from large-scale human demonstration datasets.

items.title: Abrupt Shifts in Climate Regime Detection via Deep Learning

content.abstract: Novel deep learning approach for detecting abrupt climate regime shifts in paleoclimate proxy records, improving early warning for tipping points.

items.title: Hardware Trojan Detection in Chiplet-Based Architectures

content.abstract: New framework for detecting hardware trojans in disaggregated chiplet architectures where components from different vendors are integrated.

items.title: Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Scientific Discovery

content.abstract: Framework enabling vision-language models to autonomously design and interpret scientific experiments, demonstrated across chemistry, biology, and materials science.

items.title: Personality Subnetworks in Large Language Models

content.abstract: Discovery and characterization of distinct personality subnetworks within LLMs that independently encode Big Five personality traits, with implications for AI alignment.

items.title: Federated Learning for Pandemic Preparedness Networks

content.abstract: Privacy-preserving federated learning architecture enabling real-time pandemic surveillance across international health networks without sharing raw patient data.

items.title: Carbon-Aware Compute Scheduling at Datacenter Scale

content.abstract: System for scheduling AI training workloads across geographically distributed datacenters to minimize carbon footprint while maintaining performance SLAs.

items.title: Algorithmic Fairness in Dynamic Labor Markets Under AI Automation

content.abstract: Formal model analyzing how algorithmic hiring systems amplify or attenuate labor market inequalities under increasing AI automation, with policy recommendations.
Construction of efficient MPC protocols secure against quantum adversaries, with practical implementations for financial and healthcare applications.

items.title: Sustainable AI: Energy Efficiency Benchmarks for Foundation Models

content.abstract: Comprehensive benchmark comparing energy consumption per inference across major foundation models, proposing standardized reporting framework for AI sustainability.
